name: wapimaji-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya water stress and drought intelligence. Exposes NDMA drought phase classifications for all 47 counties and SMS alert capability via Africa's Talking.

tools.name: get_drought_status
tools.description: Get current NDMA drought phase for a Kenya county (1=Minimal to 5=Famine).

tools.name: get_drought_alerts
tools.description: Get all Kenya counties at or above a specified drought phase level.

tools.name: sms_drought_alert
tools.description: Send drought alert SMS to a list of phone numbers via Africa's Talking. Destructive — sends real messages.
